title: Family violence resources for providers and educators - Canada.ca
content:
## Family violence resources for providers and educators
Access practical tools and information for providers and educators  working in the areas of family violence, intimate partner violence, child maltreatment  and mistreatment of older persons.
- Family       violence resources
- Intimate       partner violence resources
- Child maltreatment resources
- Mistreatment of older persons resources
- Research       and data on family violence

## Family violence resources
The Violence, Evidence, Guidance Action (VEGA)  Project:
- Resources to       help providers recognize and respond safely to family violence
- Online content for       health care and social service providers, including students and those in       practice
About the VEGA Project
Centre for Research & Education on Violence  Against Women & Children Knowledge Hub:
- Resources such       as guides, bulletins, infographics, reports and webinars on preventing and       addressing violence against women and children
About the Knowledge Hub

## Intimate partner violence  resources
- Resources on       bullying and youth dating violence for researchers, service providers,       educators, youth, parents and caregivers
- Goal is to build       awareness and research capacity and promote evidence-based programs and       effective policies
Also access Family  violence resources .

## Child maltreatment resources
Canadian  Consortium on Child & Youth Trauma:
- Resources such as guides and fact sheets on trauma in children and youth       for researchers, clinicians, policy-makers, community representatives and       students
- Goal is to build stronger, unified responses to child and youth       trauma
About the Canadian  Consortium on Child & Youth Trauma
- Resources and information on child abuse and neglect
- Goal is to inform policy and practice for Canadian       child and youth advocacy centres (CYACs)

## Mistreatment of older persons resources
Canadian  Network for the Prevention of Elder Abuse (CNPEA):
- Resources and       information such as research, studies and reports on the mistreatment of       older persons (also known as elder abuse)
- Goal is to       raise awareness and build support and capacity to prevent elder abuse and       neglect
Elder Abuse  Prevention Ontario:
- Resources such       as conferences, fact sheets, reports, training tools and webinars on       preventing and addressing elder abuse for service providers
About Elder Abuse  Prevention Ontario

## Research and data on family violence
- Data on victimization       trends in Canada
- Statistics on       family violence, transition homes, victim services, victimization of       children and youth, seniors and women
Statistics Canada articles and reports
Child  Maltreatment Surveillance Indicator Framework:
- Outcome       indicators and risk and protective factors (individual, family, community and       societal levels) on child maltreatment
Protective factors  in youth dating violence:
- Information on       risk and protective factors in youth dating violence and victimization
- Focus of study       is on family, friend and teacher relationships
- Based on 2022       Health Behaviour in School-Aged Children Study
